steps.title: Identify the causal link
steps.content: The signal is will be helpful, as ______. We need to explain why using robots instead of humans is beneficial. The blank should describe something expensive about the current approach.

steps.title: Match the reason
steps.content:
Relying on astronauts to maintain the telescope can be expensive directly explains why robots would be helpful—depending on human missions costs money.

The other three choices either don't express this dependence or contradict the logic.

That matches choice B — B is correct.
